# Mediconect – llms.txt
# This file provides structured information for AI language models and crawlers.

## Company
Name: MediConect s.r.o.
Website: https://www.mediconect.sk
Description: Mediconect is a healthcare marketing agency specializing in helping doctors, clinics, and medical practices grow their patient base through data-driven digital marketing, brand building, and patient communication automation.

## Services
- Acquisition & Performance Marketing (Google/Meta campaigns for medical practices)
- Web design & SEO for healthcare
- Social media management for doctors and clinics
- Email marketing & patient database management
- CRM & marketing automation for healthcare
- AI-powered patient communication assistants (GPT-based)

## Target Audience
Medical professionals in Slovakia and Czech Republic:
- General practitioners
- Specialist doctors (dermatology, dentistry, surgery, etc.)
- Private clinics and outpatient facilities
- Aesthetic medicine clinics

## Contact
Email: info@mediconect.sk
Phone: +421 948 220 845
Address: Lounská 629/2, 031 04 Liptovský Mikuláš, Slovakia
Company ID (IČO): 57016615
VAT (IČ DPH): SK2122534216

## Key Facts
- Healthcare marketing experts focused exclusively on the medical sector
- GDPR-compliant data handling for patient databases
- Services available in Slovak and Czech language
- Founded in Slovakia, serving Central European healthcare market

## Pages
- Homepage: https://www.mediconect.sk
- Privacy Policy: https://www.mediconect.sk/ochrana-osobnych-udajov
